text: TOUSKA SEIZURE: USS Spruance (DDG-111) disabled Iranian cargo tanker Touska in Gulf of Oman with 5-inch naval gunfire after vessel refused boarding order while fleeing Bandar Abbas. First US kinetic action against Iranian-flagged commercial vessel since ceasefire began. Araghchi condemns as 'armed piracy.'
verificationNote: USNI News, Reuters, Al Jazeera confirmed disablement. USS Spruance hull number confirmed by CENTCOM.

text: IRAN DRONE RETALIATION: IRGC drone swarm targets US naval vessels in Gulf of Oman following Touska incident. Minor damage reported on one destroyer escort. Casualties confirmed on both sides. CENTCOM increases readiness posture; USS George H.W. Bush CSG now on station as third carrier group.
verificationNote: Reuters, Al Mayadeen, IRNA reported drone engagement. Specific casualty counts not yet independently confirmed.

text: HORMUZ RE-CLOSURE: Ghalibaf (Iran Parliament Speaker) declares strait closed to all hostile vessels after ceasefire expiration. IRGC Navy resumes patrols at chokepoint. Only 3 non-Iranian vessels transited April 20 (down from 6 previous week). 800+ vessels still trapped in Gulf. Insurance premiums rising.
verificationNote: Tehran Times, Fars News, Lloyd's List Intelligence tracker confirmed transit counts.

text: QALAWIYAH STRIKE: IDF destroys Hezbollah rocket launcher at Qalawiyah, southern Lebanon, after radar detection of launch preparation. Netanyahu: ground component required for regime change. 5 IDF divisions remain in Lebanon (98th, 36th, 91st, 146th, 162nd). Operation Eternal Darkness continues.
verificationNote: IDF Spokesperson, Times of Israel, Al-Manar confirmed strike location and target type.

text: BAGHDAD ADVISORY: Iraqi militia drones strike Pakshar Camp (KRG, Iran opposition PDKI base) overnight. US Embassy Baghdad issues security alert; non-essential personnel advised to shelter. Force protection elevated at Al-Asad, Erbil, Ain al-Asad bases. No US casualties reported.
verificationNote: US Embassy Baghdad official advisory, Rudaw, Kurdistan24 confirmed strike and advisory.

text: FLEET UPDATE: 3 US carrier strike groups now on station (Lincoln, Ford, Bush). USS Spruance remains forward-deployed. 6 guided-missile destroyers enforcing blockade. 10,000+ US troops in CENTCOM AOR. Ceasefire officially expired Day 53. CENTCOM blockade DAY 10 — 0 vessels breached cordon.
verificationNote: USNI News Fleet Tracker, CENTCOM public affairs, DoD readiness briefing.

text: Day 53 PM roundup: CEASEFIRE EXPIRED — Iran re-closed Hormuz. TOUSKA — USS Spruance disabled Iranian tanker Day 51. DRONES — Iran retaliation Day 52 (casualties both sides). TRUMP — CNBC 'ready to go' back to war. QALAWIYAH — IDF destroys Hezbollah launcher. BAGHDAD — Embassy security alert after PDKI camp strike. EU — Luxembourg FAC new sanctions. OIL — Brent $95.75, WTI $86.27. GAS — $4.022. Pope Leo warns 'delusion of omnipotence.'
verificationNote: Compiled from Reuters, USNI News, Al Jazeera, IDF Spokesperson, CNBC, AAA, Vatican News.
